Off Calendar Sep-29-2025 Off Calendar

Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement And Mutual General Releases
Off Calendar Aug-29-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Paul Grewell for petitioner Caron Schmierer (via Zoom).

The matter came on calendar for hearing on the petition for approval of settlement agreement and mutual general releases.

Mr. Grewell advised that the Marin County Superior Court had considered the objections filed, overruled them, and issued an order approving the settlement agreement. The Court noted it had retained the matter on calendar to allow any additional objections to be raised. The Court inquired whether anyone present objected. No objections were made.

The Court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-10-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Paul Gruwell appeared via zoom for Caron Schmierer (petitioner).

Mr. Gruwell stated that Ms. De Vries client didn't file for special notice, that Ms. De Vries requested that she send the notice to her and not her client, and that since Mr. Glander appeared with counsel at the hearings, he a was not required to serve him. Ms. De Vries stated that her client has been approved of two of the settlements, and that there is a pending matter in Marin County. The matter is taken under submission with the intent to grant. Status on close of estate is set for September 29, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-23-2025 Continued To Jun-04-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement And Mutual General Releases
Off Calendar Mar-03-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Paul Gruwell for Caron Schmierer, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Robyn Christo for Debra Dolch, Creditor/Party to Settlement Agreement (via Zoom).
Lizabeth de Vries for Abraham Mertens, Ivory Madison, Elisa Patrick, and Valley of the Moon Cottages, LLC, Creditors/Parties to Settlement Agreement.

The court asked counsel to confirm that, in their view, the settlement agreements were in the best interests of the estate and all interested parties. Each appearing attorney confirmed that they believed the agreements were fair and beneficial to the estate.

The court inquired whether Marin County Superior Court had approved the settlement agreements and whether the petitioner, as temporary trustee, was authorized to make settlement payments. Counsel confirmed that the Marin court had approved the agreements on the preceding Thursday before Judge Chou, and that no objections had been raised in that proceeding or in connection with this petition.

The court noted the absence of objections from any party in this matter and took the petition under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition For Instructions To Dismiss Portions Of Pending, Estate-Related Litigation
Off Calendar Feb-28-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Paul Gruwell, Esq., for Caron Schmierer, Petitioner.
Lizabeth N. de Vries, Esq., for Abraham Mertens and Ivory Madison, interested parties.
Adrian Sawyer, Esq. for Dr. Richard Head, interested party.
Ariana Flynn, Esq., for Rebecca J. Guyette, interested party.
Shelley Clark, Esq., for Debra J. Dolch, interested party.

The court at the outset confirms that there are no appearances to object to the instant petition.

The subject matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Court Reporter: Katy Leonard, CSR: 11599, T: 415.312.9040, E: ktleo@deporep.com.

EX PARTE APPLICATION TO ADVANCE THE HEARING DATE OF CARON SCHMIERERS PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS TO DISMISS PORTIONS OF PENDING, ESTATE-RELATED LITIGATION; DECLARATION OF PAUL GRUWELL ISO EX PARTE APPLICATION
Off Calendar Jan-31-2024 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-08-2024 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jan-08-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Gruwell appeared by zoom for Caron Schmierer (petitioner).
Liza de Vries appeared by zoom for Abraham Mertens (beneficiary) and for Ivory Madison (friend of the decedent and the wife of Abraham).

The court stated that it reviewed the petition, that it is well framed and that it believes the presumption in Probate Code 6124 should not apply because of all of the moving. The court finds that the presumption of revocation has been overcome. Discussion was held as to whether it is appropriate for the court to order a bond. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The lost will dated October 5, 2016 is admitted to probate. Caron Schmierer is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with will annexed with full authority. Bond is set at $506,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for February 24, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee. Mr. Gruwell informed the court that he will be filing a petition for instructions regarding dismissal of some of the litigation in the Marin case and requested setting of a hearing date the week of January 29th. The court advised Mr. Gruwell that he will need to file his petition with the hearing date that is provided by the clerk and that he will then need to file an ex parte petition to advance the hearing.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
